title: [B1] Booking a hotel by phone
summary: A traveler calls a hotel to make a reservation.
body: Last Monday I called the Riverside Hotel. The receptionist asked when I wanted to stay. I said from June 10th to June 12th. He told me a double room was 90 euros per night. I asked if breakfast was included. He said yes, and confirmed my booking.
translationVi: Thứ Hai tuần trước tôi gọi cho khách sạn Riverside. Lễ tân hỏi tôi muốn ở khi nào. Tôi nói từ ngày 10 đến ngày 12 tháng Sáu. Anh ấy báo phòng đôi giá 90 euro mỗi đêm. Tôi hỏi có bao gồm bữa sáng không. Anh ấy nói có và xác nhận đặt phòng của tôi.

questions.explanation: 'Last Monday I called the Riverside Hotel.'

questions.prompt: How much was the room per night?
questions.explanation: '…a double room was 90 euros per night.'

questions.hint: Look at the answer to the breakfast question.

questions.prompt: What type of room did the traveler ask about?

options: The hotel employee at the front desk
questions.explanation: A receptionist is the person at the front desk who handles bookings.

questions.prompt: What did the traveler do first?
questions.explanation: First action: 'I called the Riverside Hotel.'

questions.prompt: What is the main purpose of the call?
questions.explanation: The whole passage describes making a booking.
